problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
